# Famous People Genealogy (GEDCOM 5.5.1)

## Description
Collection of GEDCOM 5.5.1 genealogy files documenting famous historical figures and royal families. These files provide real-world test cases with well-documented historical genealogy data, including literary families and European royalty.

## Test Case Type
- **Historical genealogy**: Well-documented historical figures
- **Royal family testing**: European monarchy genealogy
- **Literary family testing**: Famous authors and their families
- **Real-world data**: Actual historical research and documentation
- **Medium-to-large files**: Tests performance with substantial genealogy data

## File Information
- **GEDCOM Version**: 5.5.1 / PAF 2.2
- **Format**: `.ged` (standard GEDCOM text format)
- **Size**: 3.1 KB to 458 KB
- **Encoding**: UTF-8, US-ASCII
- **Source Software**: webtreeprint.com, PAF 2.2

## Provenance
- **Source**: Webtreeprint.com Famous GEDCOMs
- **URL**: https://webtreeprint.com/tp_famous_gedcoms.php
- **Availability**: Public genealogy resources
- **Purpose**: Historical genealogy testing
- **Accuracy**: Based on documented historical research

## License & Usage
- **License**: Public genealogy data
- **Attribution**: webtreeprint.com
- **Usage Rights**: Educational and testing purposes
- **Restrictions**: Standard genealogy data restrictions apply

## Test Files

### bronte.ged
- **Family**: Brontë family of writers
- **Description**: Genealogy of Charlotte, Emily, and Anne Brontë
- **Size**: 3.1 KB
- **Encoding**: UTF-8
- **Notable**: Famous English literary family
- **Coverage**: Brontë sisters and their relatives
- **Period**: 18th-19th century England

### royal92.ged
- **Family**: Kings and Queens of Europe (1992)
- **Description**: European royal family genealogy from 1992 dataset
- **Size**: 458 KB
- **Encoding**: US-ASCII
- **Software**: PAF 2.2 (Personal Ancestral File)
- **Notable**: Comprehensive European royalty data
- **Coverage**: Multiple royal family lines
- **Period**: Centuries of European monarchy
- **Complexity**: Large file with extensive relationships

## Testing Coverage
- **Historical accuracy**: Real historical figures with verified data
- **Literary genealogy**: Tests handling of famous personalities
- **Royal genealogy**: Complex family relationships and titles
- **Large dataset testing**: 458 KB royal family file for performance
- **PAF software output**: Tests PAF format compatibility
- **ASCII encoding**: Baseline character encoding
- **UTF-8 encoding**: Modern character encoding
- **Multi-generational trees**: Tests deep ancestry tracking
- **Complex relationships**: Royal intermarriage and succession
- **Nobility titles**: Tests title and rank handling

## Notes
- Essential for testing with real historical data
- Royal92 is excellent for performance testing (458 KB)
- Brontë file is good for quick testing with famous names
- Both files contain well-documented, verifiable data
- PAF 2.2 output tests compatibility with classic software
- Royal genealogy tests complex relationship networks
- Good for validating handling of historical dates
- Tests proper names, titles, and biographical data
- Useful for demonstrating application capabilities
- Both positive testing (valid data) and real-world scenarios
